channel.title: qnap on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in qnap on IT notes

item.title: reset qnap virtual switch
item.description: To reset the QNAP Virtualization Station, rename the file: /share/CE_CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/.QKVM to /share/CE_CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/.QKVM-backup From the App center remove/install the Virtualization Station.
